Drive-Away Dolls (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,028,215Details
International Box Office $2,922,537
Worldwide Box Office $7,950,752
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Jamie is an uninhibited free spirit bemoaning yet another breakup with a girlfriend. Her demure friend Marian desperately needs to loosen up. In search of a fresh start, the two embark on an impromptu road trip to Tallahassee, but things quickly go awry when they cross paths with a group of inept criminals along the way.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$2,404,330 (47.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.09 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:63.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,280 opening theaters/2,280 max. theaters, 2.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $5,317,189

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 23rd, 2024 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: February 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Georgia)
February 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
February 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Israel)
February 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (New Zealand)
February 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Garotas em Fuga (Brazil)
Video Release: March 12th, 2024 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for crude sexual content, full nudity, language and some violent content.
(Rating bulletin 2791 (cert #54255), 7/12/2023)
Running Time: 83 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): Pennsylvania, United States
Geographical setting: Florida
Plot point: Crime, Relationships Gone Wrong, Road Trip
Social setting: Crime Caper
Subgenre: Action Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Focus Features, Working Title Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
